title: Novokuznetsk, Kemerovo Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Novokuznetsk, Kemerovo Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Novokuznetsk is a city in Kemerovo Oblast with a population of 540,000. One of Siberia’s largest industrial cities, a major steel and coal production center in the Kuznetsk Basin.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
